question: Within how many days can a customer request a full refund?
ground_truth: A customer may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date.
contexts: Customers may request a full refund within 30 days of the original purchase date.

question: Are gift cards refundable?
ground_truth: No, gift cards are non-refundable under all circumstances.
contexts: Gift cards, downloadable software licenses that have been activated, and personalized or custom-made products are non-refundable under all circumstances.

question: How long do customers have for store credit eligibility?
ground_truth: Purchases older than 30 days but within 90 days are eligible for store credit only.
contexts: Purchases older than 30 days but within 90 days are eligible for store credit only.

question: Who pays return shipping when a product is defective?
ground_truth: Acme Corp covers the return shipping when the return is due to a defect or an error by Acme Corp.
contexts: Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the return is due to a defect or an error by Acme Corp, in which case Acme Corp covers the return shipping.

question: How long are digital products refundable?
ground_truth: Digital products and subscription services are refundable within 14 days of purchase if less than 20 percent of usage has been consumed.
contexts: Digital products and subscription services are refundable within 14 days of purchase provided that less than 20 percent of the included usage has been consumed.

question: What was Acme Corp's total annual revenue in fiscal year 2024?
ground_truth: Total annual revenue was 145 million dollars in fiscal year 2024.
contexts: Acme Corp reported total annual revenue of 145 million dollars in fiscal year 2024, representing a 22 percent increase over the prior year.

question: What percentage of revenue came from subscriptions?
ground_truth: Recurring subscription revenue accounted for 68 percent of total revenue.
contexts: Recurring subscription revenue accounted for 68 percent of total revenue.

question: How much revenue did the enterprise segment generate?
ground_truth: The enterprise segment generated 92 million dollars in revenue.
contexts: The enterprise segment generated 92 million dollars in revenue, while the small and medium business segment contributed 41 million dollars.

question: What was the net income for fiscal year 2024?
ground_truth: Net income for fiscal year 2024 was 27 million dollars.
contexts: Net income for fiscal year 2024 was 27 million dollars, yielding a net profit margin of approximately 18.6 percent.

question: What was the net profit margin?
ground_truth: The net profit margin was approximately 18.6 percent.
contexts: Net income for fiscal year 2024 was 27 million dollars, yielding a net profit margin of approximately 18.6 percent.

question: What is the projected revenue growth for fiscal year 2025?
ground_truth: Management projects revenue growth of 18 to 24 percent for fiscal year 2025.
contexts: Management projects revenue growth of 18 to 24 percent for fiscal year 2025, driven primarily by expansion of the enterprise subscription base and international markets.

question: How many vacation days do full-time employees accrue per year?
ground_truth: Full-time employees accrue twenty days of paid vacation per year.
contexts: Full-time employees accrue twenty days of paid vacation per year, in addition to ten paid public holidays.

question: How many days per week can employees work remotely?
ground_truth: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week.
contexts: Employees may work remotely up to three days per week.

question: How long is paid parental leave?
ground_truth: New parents are entitled to sixteen weeks of paid parental leave.
contexts: New parents are entitled to sixteen weeks of paid parental leave, which may be taken at any point within the first twelve months following the birth or adoption of a child.

question: What is the annual professional development budget per employee?
ground_truth: Each employee receives an annual professional development budget of two thousand dollars.
contexts: Each employee receives an annual professional development budget of two thousand dollars, which may be used for courses, conferences, certifications, or books that are relevant to their role.

question: What are the core collaboration hours?
ground_truth: Core collaboration hours run from ten in the morning to three in the afternoon.
contexts: Core collaboration hours, during which all team members are expected to be available, run from ten in the morning to three in the afternoon.

question: How many sick days are granted per year?
ground_truth: Sick leave is granted at ten days per year and does not roll over.
contexts: Sick leave is granted separately at ten days per year and does not roll over.

question: How much did Acme Corp spend on research and development?
ground_truth: Research and development spending rose to 31 million dollars.
contexts: Research and development spending rose to 31 million dollars, the largest single expense category.

question: What was the gross margin in fiscal year 2024?
ground_truth: Gross margin improved to 74 percent, up from 70 percent the previous year.
contexts: Gross margin improved to 74 percent, up from 70 percent in the previous fiscal year.

question: How much cash did the company have at year end?
ground_truth: The company ended the year with 63 million dollars in cash and cash equivalents.
contexts: The company ended the fiscal year with 63 million dollars in cash and cash equivalents, with no outstanding long-term debt.
